
::: {tbl-colwidths="[20, 80]"}

| Updated | Document |
|----------|---------|
| 2026-07-13 | [타그마(Tagma) Project](/index.html) <sup style="background:#2c8;color:#fff;font-size:.65em;padding:0 .4em;border-radius:3px;">N</sup> |
| 2026-07-15 | Papers > Domains > [Tagma-ID](/papers/domains/id.html) |
| 2026-07-15 | Papers > [Tagma](/papers/wp.html) |


:::
